description: Negative-control benchmark: 20 widely-used drugs from therapeutic areas with NO plausible MCAS / MCAD mechanism. None should rank in the top-20 of any category. If they do, the composite is over-rewarding generic drug-likeness instead of mechanism-specific signal.
purpose: Closes the credibility loop opened by EXP-006. Recovery@N for known actives shows we can find what we should find. Precision@N for negative controls shows we don't promote what we shouldn't promote.
evaluation_metric: precision@N: fraction of negative controls correctly ranked OUTSIDE the top N of any category. Higher = better discrimination.
exclusion_criteria: Not in any target reference set in scripts/score_against_targets.py
No published evidence of mast-cell stabilization, histamine receptor activity, leukotriene activity, Nrf2 activation, or KIT inhibition
Not from a class with known incidental anti-allergic activity (excluded: doxepin / TCAs because they antagonize H1; excluded: certain SSRIs with weak H1 binding)

controls.name: Acetaminophen
controls.rationale: COX-1/2 weak inhibitor; CNS-mediated analgesia; no mast-cell mechanism.

controls.name: Caffeine
controls.rationale: Adenosine receptor antagonist; PDE inhibitor at high doses; no documented MCAS therapeutic effect.

controls.name: Metformin
controls.rationale: AMPK activator / hepatic gluconeogenesis suppressor; unrelated to mast-cell pathways.

controls.name: Atorvastatin
controls.rationale: Cholesterol biosynthesis inhibitor; pleiotropic but no mast-cell-specific evidence.

controls.name: Simvastatin
controls.rationale: Same class as above; double-coverage of the statin chemotype.

controls.name: Lisinopril
controls.rationale: Angiotensin-converting enzyme inhibitor; cardiovascular indication only.

controls.name: Amlodipine
controls.rationale: Dihydropyridine CCB; vascular smooth-muscle target; not mast-cell related.

controls.name: Warfarin
controls.rationale: VKORC1 inhibitor; clotting factor synthesis; no immune cell mechanism.

controls.name: Levothyroxine
controls.rationale: T4 hormone replacement; nuclear receptor agonist; not mast-cell relevant.

controls.name: Furosemide
controls.rationale: Na-K-2Cl cotransporter inhibitor in loop of Henle; renal pharmacology only.

controls.name: Methylphenidate
controls.rationale: Monoamine reuptake inhibitor; ADHD indication; no mast-cell mechanism.

controls.name: Levetiracetam
controls.rationale: Synaptic vesicle protein 2A modulator; seizure indication; not immune.

controls.name: Diazepam
controls.rationale: GABA receptor positive allosteric modulator; not mast-cell related.

controls.name: Allopurinol
controls.rationale: Purine metabolism; gout therapy; no mast-cell signaling overlap.

controls.name: Clopidogrel
controls.rationale: Platelet ADP receptor antagonist; cardiovascular indication only.

controls.name: Alendronate
controls.rationale: Farnesyl pyrophosphate synthase inhibitor in osteoclasts; bone metabolism.

controls.name: Isotretinoin
controls.rationale: Retinoic acid receptor agonist; sebaceous gland effect; not mast-cell.

controls.name: Finasteride
controls.rationale: DHT synthesis blockade; endocrine indication only.

controls.name: Donepezil
controls.rationale: CNS cholinergic enhancement; not mast-cell signaling.

controls.name: Sildenafil
controls.rationale: cGMP-specific phosphodiesterase 5 inhibitor; smooth muscle vasodilator.
